A THE VIVI Signature
LLUCI
TWO MICHELIN STARS
Two Michelin Stars · Est. 2011

Where Every Meal Becomes A Memory 

An intimate theatre of seasonal cuisine, rare wine and table-side fire — nested within THE VIVI, yet a world entirely its own.

Our Story

A Ritual Of Fire, Time & Craft 

Born from a single candlelit table in 2011,

Lluci began as a quiet rebellion against the ordinary.

We believe dinner is not a service — it is a performance.

Every plate is composed like a scene. Every flame, intentional.

14
Years
40+
Signature Plates
1
Obsession
“Fire & Patience.”
— Chef Elena Cruz
The Signature Experience

An Evening in Four Acts

The nine-course Discovery Menu unfolds over three unhurried hours — a piece of theatre plated for you alone.

I

The Welcome

A glass of vintage Krug and a warm hand cloth as you cross the threshold into candlelight.

II

The Journey

Nine seasonal courses, each introduced by the chef who created it, paced like chapters of a novel.

III

The Theatre

Fire, smoke and gold — signature dishes finished at your table beneath a veil of applewood smoke.

IV

The Farewell

A final sweet, a signed menu and a memory you'll carry for years.

The Discovery Menu

Nine Courses · Three Hours

A guided journey through Elena's kitchen, with an optional sommelier pairing of rare vintages chosen for each plate.

₹9,500
per guest
+₹6,000
wine pairing
Elena Cruz
Executive Chef · Founder of Lluci
The Visionary

The Hands Behind Every Flame 

“I do not cook to feed. I cook to stop time.”

The Menu

Crafted to be Remembered

Chef's Pick 4.9

Saffron Lobster Bisque

₹1,450

Slow-simmered blue lobster, Kashmiri saffron cream, aged brandy foam and micro-herb dust.

320 kcal 18 min96% loved
4.7

Charred Beetroot Tartare

₹980

Smoked heirloom beetroot, capers, cured egg yolk and a shard of sourdough crisp.

210 kcal 14 min88% loved
Chef's Pick 5

Wagyu A5 Sirloin

₹4,200

Japanese A5 wagyu, black-garlic jus, smoked bone marrow and truffle pomme purée.

620 kcal 26 min99% loved
4.8

Miso Glazed Black Cod

₹2,650

72-hour marinated black cod, yuzu-miso lacquer and pickled ginger pearls.

480 kcal 22 min92% loved
Chef's Pick 4.9

Truffle Risotto Nerano

₹1,980

Carnaroli risotto, aged parmesan and fresh Alba white truffle shaved table-side.

540 kcal 24 min90% loved
Chef's Pick 5

Valrhona Gold Sphere

₹1,150

Dark chocolate sphere, warm salted caramel poured table-side, finished with 24k gold leaf.

390 kcal table-side97% loved
4.6

Deconstructed Tiramisu

₹890

Mascarpone cloud, espresso soil, cocoa air and an amaretto glass shard.

340 kcal 12 min85% loved
Chef's Pick 4.9

Hand-Dived Scallops

₹1,680

Orkney scallops, brown-butter hollandaise, apple and a whisper of vanilla oil.

260 kcal 16 min91% loved
The Cellar

A Living Wine Library

Over 1,200 labels across twelve countries, guided by our head sommelier. A selection below.

Château Margaux

Red · 2009
Bordeaux, France

Velvet tannins, cassis, cedar and violet.

Glass
₹4,200
Bottle
₹68,000

Domaine Leflaive Montrachet

White · 2016
Burgundy, France

Flint, white peach and a saline finish.

Glass
₹5,200
Bottle
₹92,000

Sassicaia Tenuta

Red · 2015
Tuscany, Italy

Blackcurrant, graphite, Mediterranean herbs.

Glass
₹3,400
Bottle
₹54,000

Krug Grande Cuvée

Sparkling · NV
Champagne, France

Brioche, citrus zest, endless fine mousse.

Glass
₹3,800
Bottle
₹46,000

Cloudy Bay

White · 2022
Marlborough, NZ

Passionfruit, lime and cut grass.

Glass
₹1,400
Bottle
₹8,600

Penfolds Grange

Red · 2014
South Australia

Plum, mocha, dark spice, decades of ageing.

Glass
₹4,600
Bottle
₹78,000
The Bar

Liquid Alchemy

Signature cocktails built like courses — smoke, gold and hand-carved ice, mixed table-side.

Smoked Old Fashioned

₹950

Applewood-smoked bourbon, bitter orange, demerara, hand-carved clear ice.

Gold Negroni

₹1050

Barrel-aged gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, edible gold.

Saffron Sour

₹890

Saffron-infused whisky, aquafaba, citrus, honey.

Midnight Martini

₹1150

Charcoal-washed vodka, dry vermouth, olive caviar.

Three intimate spaces for celebrations that deserve total privacy — each with a dedicated brigade and sommelier.

The Atmosphere

Moments, Framed in Gold

What's On

Evenings to Remember

Limited-seat wine dinners, chef's tables and tastings — booked months in advance.

Aug 14
Wine Dinner

Barolo & Truffle Night

A six-course journey through Piedmont with rare Barolo verticals and shaved Alba truffle.

₹18,500 / guest
Sep 02
Chef's Table

Elena's Kaiseki Series

An intimate ten-seat kaiseki evening — Elena cooks the entire menu before you.

₹24,000 / guest
Oct 21
Tasting

Champagne & Caviar

Grande cuvées poured beside three grades of Ossetra, live jazz until midnight.

₹16,000 / guest
